case_title: THOMAS SUDAN VS. DARIN CIFUENTES ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUDAN, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT BARNET, LANCE

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SUDAN, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT CIFUENTES, DARIN BARNET, LANCE PEREZ, GABRIEL BARNET, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUDAN, THOMAS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF THOMAS SUDAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DARIN CIFUENTES IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISI. DEFENDANTS LANCE BARNET AND VICTORA MARIA BARNET ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIEL PEREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PEREZ INFORMED THE COURT THAT SERVICE WAS PROPER AND WAIVES ANY FILING ISSUES. AFTER HEARING THE CASE THE COURT FINDS THE WRONG DEFENDANT WAS NAMED, AND DISMISSES THE CASES AGAINST ALL THE LISTED DEFENDANTS WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUDAN, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT BARNET, MARIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE** COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNET, MARIA
